layout_description:
Option: OPT-1-REVISED
Slide description: TWO-COLUMN LAYOUT with full-width footer. The slide uses a side-by-side arrangement with two equal-width content columns occupying the upper portion of the slide body, followed by a full-width footer bar at the bottom. Each column is a self-contained card with a filled header bar, icon badge, subtitle, and bullet list content. The layout emphasizes visual symmetry and equal weight between the two service offerings. A generous top margin separates the title from the content area. The footer spans the full slide width and sits at the bottom with a small gap above it. All elements snap to a 2-column grid with consistent gutters. The design uses the Filled-Header Block Table pattern (Section 4, Option B) adapted for side-by-side service cards. This revision addresses the judge feedback by increasing body font size significantly to fill the available vertical space within each card, eliminating the excessive whitespace at the bottom of the bullet lists.

Blueprint:
  Orientation: left-to-right
  Regions: 3
  Allocation: [0.48, 0.48, 0.04]

Containers:
  C0 (LEFT COLUMN — TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM CARD): Left column occupying 48% of slide width, positioned at left edge of content area. This is a vertical card structure with four sections stacked top-to-bottom: (1) Icon badge at top — a small circular badge with brand accent fill containing a laptop/monitor icon in white, positioned at top-left of the card with a small inset from the card edge. Badge diameter proportional to header text height, approximately 15% of card width. (2) Filled header bar immediately below the badge — solid brand dark fill (dark navy), full card width, compact height (just enough to contain the text with small top/bottom inset), white bold text reading 'TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM' in all-caps, left-aligned with small left padding. Header bar height approximately 8-10% of card height. (3) Subtitle text below header — light grey italic text reading 'Cryptocurrency Analytics Capabilities', left-aligned, small top margin below the header bar. Subtitle uses body font at regular size. (4) Bullet list section filling remaining card height — six bullet points describing platform capabilities, using brand-color circle bullet markers (small, proportional to body text height), body font, brand text color, left-aligned with moderate left inset. Bullet text: 'Blockchain monitoring', 'Entity identification & attribution', 'Automated risk scoring', 'Analytics of VASP data', 'Investigation workbench', 'Dashboards & analytics'. CRITICAL FONT SIZE ADJUSTMENT per judge feedback: Body font size must be increased significantly from the previous attempt (was ~16pt, now target range: large-to-very-large, approximately 20-22pt) to ensure the bullet list text fills at least 65% of the container inner height. Line-height must be increased proportionally to maintain readability and vertical rhythm. The bullet list must distribute evenly across the available vertical space using flexGrow on each bullet item, eliminating the empty band at the bottom of the card. The entire card has a white background, thin brand-color border, visibly rounded corners, and a subtle even light grey shadow glow for card lift effect. Generous internal padding on all sides. The card height extends from below the title to just above the footer area, filling approximately 75% of the vertical slide body space.
  C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — CAPACITY BUILDING CARD): Right column occupying 48% of slide width, positioned at right edge of content area, equal-peers with LEFT COLUMN. This card mirrors the exact structural pattern of the left column: (1) Icon badge at top — circular badge with brand accent fill containing a graduation cap icon in white, positioned at top-left of the card. Badge diameter proportional to header text height, approximately 15% of card width. (2) Filled header bar — solid brand dark fill (dark navy), full card width, compact height, white bold text reading 'CAPACITY BUILDING' in all-caps, left-aligned. Header bar height approximately 8-10% of card height. (3) Subtitle text — light grey italic text reading 'Training & Knowledge Transfer', left-aligned, small top margin. Subtitle uses body font at regular size. (4) Bullet list section — six bullet points describing training offerings, using brand-color circle bullet markers, body font, brand text color, left-aligned. Bullet text: 'Foundation training for all staff', 'Practitioner certification', 'Specialist programs', 'Leadership briefings', 'Hands-on labs', 'Case study workshops'. CRITICAL FONT SIZE ADJUSTMENT per judge feedback: Body font size must match C0 exactly (large-to-very-large, approximately 20-22pt) to preserve within-slide uniformity (Rule C6). Line-height must match C0. The bullet list must distribute evenly across the available vertical space using flexGrow on each bullet item, eliminating the empty band at the bottom of the card. The card has identical visual treatment to the left column: white background, thin brand-color border, visibly rounded corners, subtle even light grey shadow glow. Generous internal padding. The card height matches the left column exactly — both cards share identical top and bottom edges (Rule B2). The two cards are separated by a 4% horizontal gutter (consistent with Rule B3).
  C2 (FULL-WIDTH FOOTER BAR): Full-width footer bar spanning 100% of slide width, positioned at the bottom of the slide with a small vertical gap above it (approximately 3% of slide height separating it from the bottom edge of the two cards above). The bar has a compact height — just tall enough to contain the text with small top/bottom inset padding (approximately 6-8% of slide height). Fill: brand accent color. No border. Corners: slightly rounded (softer than sharp, but less rounded than the content cards). Text: white, body font, regular weight, horizontally centered and vertically centered within the bar. Text content: 'Log-term partnerships including support training and ability to adapt and provide solutions to emerging needs'. Font size for footer text: body font at regular size (smaller than the increased card body text, as footer text is subordinate to main content). The bar sits at a fixed position at the bottom of the slide, anchored to the slide's bottom safe-area margin.
  SC-BOTTOM (DECORATIVE BACKGROUND LAYER): Inactive. The slide is well-filled by the two content cards and footer bar. No additional decorative background layer is needed. The cards themselves provide sufficient visual structure and the white slide background is appropriate for this layout.
  SC-TOP (OVERLAY CONNECTOR LAYER): Inactive. No cross-container connectors or overlay elements are needed for this layout. The two columns are independent service offerings with no visual relationship requiring connectors.
